artPrompt: A weary human bureaucrat half-rises from behind a service counter, caught mid-shrug, one hand lifted in reluctant greeting, the other still anchored to the desk as if longing to stay seated. Cold fluorescent light flattens his rumpled cardigan; a faint cyan glow leaks from blank forms beside him. Tall framing, gesture of obligation over fine detail. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: The Reluctant Ombudsman
text:
Flash
When The Reluctant Ombudsman enters the battlefield, tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. (It will be unstunned once its complaint has been formally heard, which is to say, at its controller's next untap step.)
flavorText: He is here to help. He would very much rather not be.
